response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience and a genuine track record in high-throughput distributed systems, but the Principal Growth/Experimentation role demands deep, specialized expertise in A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging infrastructure, telemetry platforms, rollout-risk management, and statistical experimentation analysis — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. The gap between a generalist senior/staff profile and the highly specialized IC6-level experimentation systems focus is too large to bridge, particularly at a level where cross-org influence and domain authority are baseline expectations.
strengths: 15+ years across production distributed systems, including high-scale low-latency work handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Polyglot engineer covering JavaScript/TypeScript, C, C++, Java, and C# — satisfies the stated language breadth requirement
Demonstrated testing-first culture through TDD practice, open-source testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and community-facing workshops
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience: no mention of A/B testing systems, feature flagging, experiment assignment, bias detection, or rollout automation — the core of this role
No telemetry, metrics, or observability platform work evident; growth measurement and instrumentation infrastructure are foundational requirements here
Resume reflects a senior/staff generalist trajectory without the cross-org Principal-level influence, growth domain ownership, or statistical analysis depth this IC6 position requires

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
